intent_summary: Phase 5.9 reproducible example. Self-audit on oida-code itself: the verifier-grounded path runs pytest against tests/test_phase5_8_x_pytest_summary_line.py and grounds a capability_sufficient claim that the pytest_summary_line schema field on VerifierToolResult is publicly observable. Example only — diagnostic, no product verdict, official fields stay null.

evidence_items.summary: ADR-47 (commit 93c7581 on yannabadie/oida-code) added pytest_summary_line: str | None = None to VerifierToolResult (frozen Pydantic, max_length=400). PytestAdapter overrides extract_summary_line(stdout) to populate the field from pytest's terminal summary line.

Phase 5.9 example evidence chain: tests/test_phase5_8_x_pytest_summary_line.py covers schema invariants, parser variants (passed/failed/skipped/errors), ANSI-strip survival, and adapter integration, so a clean pytest pass on this scope demonstrates the capability is publicly usable.
